description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Active Auction House allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) ReturnURL, (2) password, (3) username parameter, (4) ReturnURL parameter to account.asp, (5) Table, (6) Title parameter to sendpassword.asp, or (7) itemid to watchthisitem.asp.
